backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend for a product/affiliate management app with blob storage, HTTP outcalls, content generation (stub), product CRUD, affiliate CRUD, settings, and content history.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming two implemented features in ContentGeneratorPage.tsx: a 'Back to Home' button and a 'Clear' button, each mapped to test IDs and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short summaries describing each file's role, covering content generation, formatting, history, settings, UI components, and routing.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark CSS custom properties (oklch-based design tokens) for the app's luxury dark/gold theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app, configured for RTL Persian layout with the Shayla brand title and meta tags.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with lazy-loaded page routes, a shared AppLayout with header/footer, and reactive settings application via Zustand.
frontend/src/components/ContentHistory.t: Displays a scrollable list of content generation history entries with timestamps, URLs, and per-entry delete buttons using the useDeleteHistoryEntry hook.
frontend/src/components/ContentOutput.ts: Tabbed output component showing generated content formatted for four platforms (website, Instagram, Ita, blog) with per-section and copy-all clipboard buttons.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders a sticky site header with a centered logo (with fallback text), a back-navigation button on non-home pages, and a placeholder div for balance alignment.
frontend/src/components/NeonBorder.tsx: Animates a glowing neon dot traveling around a border frame using canvas and requestAnimationFrame, cycling through multiple colors with a blink transition between each loop.
frontend/src/components/ParticleAnimatio: Renders a full-screen canvas particle burst animation originating from a given coordinate, applying gravity and fade-out, then calling onComplete when all particles die.
frontend/src/components/PlatformSwitcher: A segmented button group that lets the user switch between four content platforms (website, Instagram, Ita, blog), highlighting the active selection with gold styling.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: A form component for adding or editing a product, handling name, prices (with auto 40% markup), description, specs, tags, and image uploads, then submitting via the useAddOrUpdateProduct mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProductUploadHel: Displays generated product content fields (name, prices, description, specs, tags, images) with individual and bulk copy-to-clipboard buttons for easy manual upload to the Shayla platform.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook that manage ICP AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flow, and persisted delegation identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on products, affiliates, settings, and content history, each using the ICP actor from useActor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Manages app settings with a Zustand store and React Query, applying theme/font/accent changes to the DOM whenever settings are fetched or updated.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines the global CSS including Tailwind directives, a luxury dark theme with CSS custom properties (gold palette, navy backgrounds), RTL body layout, scrollbar styling, and utility component classes like neon-border-frame.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AffiliateMarketingPag: Page for managing affiliate marketing entries, providing a form to add/edit affiliates (link, commission, notes) and a list view with edit and delete actions.
Page that accepts a product URL, calls the content generation utility with step-by-step progress feedback, displays the generated content, and saves the result to history.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page displaying a grid of navigation tiles (content generator, products, affiliate, settings) with a particle animation effect triggered when clicking the main tile.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Displays a searchable list of products with add, edit, and delete functionality, using React Query hooks and a ProductForm component for CRUD operations.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page that loads and saves app configuration (theme, content preferences, platform defaults) to the backend, with a local form state synced from backend data.
frontend/src/types/history.ts: Defines the TypeScript interface for client-side content history entries stored in localStorage, including product content fields and metadata.
frontend/src/utils/contentGenerator.ts: Utility that fetches product page HTML via a backend actor or CORS proxy fallback chain, then parses and extracts structured product data (title, price, specs, images, tags) from the HTML.
frontend/src/utils/platformFormatters.ts: Formats generated product content into platform-specific sections (website, Instagram, ITA, blog), including SEO metadata, HTML templates, and price formatting.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a luxury dark theme with gold/navy color palette, custom shadows, animations, and typography/container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 15) for the Shayla luxury app, documenting features, architectural notes, known issues, and requirements for a multi-tile content generation and product management app with neon UI effects.
